arts.ttl: Latest Chelsea injury news as four miss Bournemouth amid Reece James wait and Romeo Lavia update
arts.sum: Romeo Lavia and Reece James have both missed the last few weeks of action, Malo Gusto has also picked up an issue with Maresca giving the latest on all three in his press conference. Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca has issued a triple injury update ahead of the Premier League clash against Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Arsenal & Chelsea legend 'set to join' England coaching staff
arts.sum: England Under-21s boss Carsley was given the call-up to lead the senior Three Lions through UEFA Nations League fixtures against the Republic of Ireland and Finland in September, and is expected to remain at the helm for two further international games at least. Ashley Cole is set to leave Birmingham City and join the Football Association full-time after working alongside Lee Carsley in September.

arts.ttl: Chelsea outcast David Datro Fofana completes loan move to Turkish side Goztepe two days after switch to AEK Athens collapsed
arts.sum: The 21-year-old is set to spend the season with the Turkish side, who have an option to sign him permanently thereafter, as reported by the club's official website.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues confirm striker exit after record deal collapses
arts.sum: Chelsea confirm that Ivorian striker David Datro Fofana has joined Turkish side Goztepe SK on loan for the remainder of the season.

arts.ttl: Newcastle join Chelsea & Spurs in race for teenage star who scored on international debut last week
arts.sum: Newcastle United have entered the race to sign Danish left-back Patrick Dorgu, according to reports. Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur have been heavily linked with the 19-year-old, who has caught the eye with Italian side Lecce over the last 18 months, making 38 senior appearances. arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca addresses Chelsea's uncertain ownership situation
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca breaks his silence on the power struggle taking place between Chelsea's co-owners Todd Boehly and Clearlake Capital.
